# ExtractVibe

> Open-source brand intelligence API that extracts comprehensive brand kits from any website.

ExtractVibe is a REST API that extracts colors, typography, voice, logos, design tokens, and brand personality from any URL. It uses a dual-AI pipeline (Cloudflare Workers AI + OpenRouter) to analyze websites and produce structured brand kits in JSON, CSS, Tailwind, Markdown, and W3C Design Token formats. Free tier includes 50 extractions per month.

## Getting Started
- [Quickstart](https://extractvibe.com/docs/quickstart.md): Get your first brand extraction in 30 seconds
- [Authentication](https://extractvibe.com/docs/authentication.md): API keys, session auth, and agent bootstrap

## API Reference
- [Extract Brand](https://extractvibe.com/docs/extract.md): Start extractions, poll status, get results
- [Export Formats](https://extractvibe.com/docs/export.md): JSON, CSS Variables, Tailwind, Markdown, Design Tokens
- [Brand Lookup](https://extractvibe.com/docs/brand.md): Cached brand kit lookup by domain
- [Credits](https://extractvibe.com/docs/credits.md): Check credit balance and plan
- [API Keys](https://extractvibe.com/docs/keys.md): Create, list, and revoke API keys
- [Agent Bootstrap](https://extractvibe.com/docs/agent-bootstrap.md): LLM/AI agent self-provisioning

## Reference
- [Rate Limits](https://extractvibe.com/docs/rate-limits.md): Request limits by tier
- [Error Codes](https://extractvibe.com/docs/errors.md): Error handling reference
- [Brand Kit Schema](https://extractvibe.com/docs/schema.md): Full output schema reference
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://extractvibe.com/api/openapi.json): Machine-readable API specification
- [Full Documentation](https://extractvibe.com/llms-full.txt): Complete API docs in one file
